_comment: Example manifest for Thinkorswim Momentum Intelligence parity fixtures. Copy to manifest.json and replace the example values with real Thinkorswim observations or exports. Do not commit fabricated parity values. ToS does not export the Momentum study rows, so 'visual_observation' is the practical mode for most fixtures. See README.md and docs/thinkorswim-momentum-parity.md for the full workflow.

fixtures._comment: EXAMPLE — replace these placeholder visual values with real numbers manually read from a Thinkorswim rendered chart label. parity_mode is 'visual_observation' because ToS does not export the Momentum study output.
fixtures.name: XLK_1D_visual_sample
fixtures.screenshot_notes: Cropped to the True Momentum Score panel — placeholder reference only.
fixtures.notes: Placeholder visual observation. Replace with real values transcribed from the ToS chart labels for the bar dated observed_bar_date.

fixtures._comment: EXAMPLE — exported_study_csv fixtures remain supported for any operator who can capture the ToS study output (e.g. via a third-party study exporter). Replace expected_latest with the values from the last row of the study CSV.
